title: Binary corporate referendum-style decision over 6 polling rounds

events.description: Dr. AGAINST_LEADER_1 is forcibly removed from United Express Flight 3411 by aviation security officers after refusing to give up his seat for PRO_LEADER_2 crew. | Videos of the violent removal go viral on AGAINST_LEADER_2 AGAINST_LEADER_2, sparking global outrage and widespread condemnation of United Airlines' handling of the situation
United Airlines CEO PRO_LEADER_1 issues an initial statement apologizing for having to 're-accommodate' customers, which is widely criticized as tone-deaf
United Airlines stock price drops significantly following the public relations fallout, wiping out nearly $1 billion in market value
CEO PRO_LEADER_1 issues a second, more contrite apology, taking full responsibility and promising a thorough review of PRO_LEADER_2 policies
United Airlines reaches an undisclosed settlement with Dr. AGAINST_LEADER_1 to resolve claims related to the incident
United Airlines announces a new policy allowing passengers to receive up to $10,000 in compensation for voluntarily giving up their seats
